feed.title: Steam
feed.subtitle: Combined Steam news feed: the global Steam news feed plus selected games and groups, from Steam's native news RSS.

entry.title: Watch Night of the Living Dead and other public domain horror movies inside this creepy dollfest
entry.content: Isla de las Muñecas, the Mexican island that holds the Guinness World Record for largest collection of haunted dolls, served as the inspiration for Where Dolls Hang, a survival horror game where you play a detective searching for people who've gone missing in a particularly cursed location... Read more.

entry.title: Danganronpa 2x2 remaster will include a 'slayhem' alternate story mode with '20% more content' and a 3D world map, but it's been delayed to 2027
entry.content: Last year Spike Chunsoft announced a remaster of divisive visual novel sequel Danganronpa 2: Goodbye Despair to be called Danganronpa 2x2. Intriguingly, said remaster will also include an alternate storyline, so if you don't want to suffer through the original story again you can experience a different version of events playing out on its murder island deathtrap... Read more.

entry.title: One of our favorite Half-Life 2 mods is getting a stealth game prequel where you're a Combine assassin preying on the human resistance
entry.content: The cult classic Half-Life 2 mod series Entropy: Zero has another entry in the works, and speaking as a fan of Thief, Deus Ex, and all things immersive sim, Entropy: Zero 2 - Progenitors may be the most exciting one yet... Read more.

entry.title: Marvel Rivals players suspect Captain America's summer sausage has already been downsized
entry.content: Last week, Marvel Rivals made the headlines for a familiar reason: one of its new skins is on the bleeding edge of horny superhero costume design. But in a refreshing change of pace, it was the boys' turn this time around—Captain America got a summer swimsuit skin with proportions so absurd they'd make a Gears of War character blush and an egregiously huge bulge for his… Washington Monument... Read more.

entry.title: Hasbro should stop looking for a Baldur's Gate 4 studio and take a leaf out of Larian's book by trying something new
entry.content: Larian didn't want to make Baldur's Gate 4 , BioWare veteran James Ohlen didn't want to make Baldur's Gate 4, so who's going to make it? I'm not going to answer that question, not just because I don't have a clue , but because I'm starting to think that nobody should make it... Read more.

entry.title: Coaches: MAN Lion's Coach Gameplay Preview
entry.content: Today, we’re excited to share your very first look at gameplay from our upcoming Coaches DLC for Euro Truck Simulator 2, a highly anticipated expansion that many of you in our community have been eager to see more of. Let's hit the road! In this first showcase, we go behind the wheel of the MAN Lion's Coach . Join us as we take on a bus route between Duisburg and Rotterdam. Along the way, you’ll get a glimpse at the passenger satisfaction mechanics in its current iteration, and how it will play

entry.title: We hit 15 million in sales! Thanks a million!
entry.content: We hit 15 million in sales! Thanks a million! Get ready for a new collaboration with a famous Japanese star next week!

entry.title: Researchers studying ChatGPT conversations surprised to find one power user churning out thousands of Doki Doki Literature Club pregnancy fics
entry.content: s spotted by Japan's IT Media News , a paper presented at Purdue University's MFS Cultural AI Conference called AI Fiction in the Wild performed a fascinating study of half a million anonymous English-language ChatGPT-user conversations using WildChat, and found some real oddities. Well, one in particular... Read more.

entry.title: Counter-Strike 2 might be the biggest game on Steam, but Global Offensive is breaking player count records since it went standalone again
entry.content: nytime you're talking about the hottest game on Steam, there's an evergreen unspoken caveat: 'after Counter-Strike, of course.' CS2 is unquestionably Steam's killer app—it has well over a million concurrent players as I write this according to SteamDB, and it's showing no signs of slowing down. But don't count out the game it once absorbed and then spat out : its predecessor, Global Offensive... Read more.

entry.title: Modders made a Fallout 4 quest in a weekend for charity, and it features iconic Elder Scrolls actor Wes Johnson
entry.content: new Fallout 4 mod, Double Feature, is the fourth collaboration by modders Kinggath and co. with Elder Scrolls icon Wes Johnson—the man behind characters like Molag Bal, Sheogorath, and a whole lot more —as well as Fallout actors Jan Johns and Leer Leary. It's part of Kinggath's annual modding for charity project, which led to the creation of similar mods like Shady Motives and Trunk's Malfunction ... Read more.

Hoist the sails and experience his next chapter of incredibly true adventures in ARK Tides of Fortune! entry.title: Mouthwashing's follow-up is self-described 'friendsweat' where 3 players struggle to operate a tank in a defiled city: 'We're definitely not quite at Peak, but we're not trying to make Arma either'
entry.content: head of Carcass Clad's reveal at last month's PC Gaming Show, I had the chance to speak to Wrong Organ devs Jeffrey Tomec and Dave van Egdom about the studio's follow-up to its breakout hit, Mouthwashing. Carcass Clad is a very different sort of game , but with familiar themes and atmosphere . The bulk of our conversation, though, was about why the studio pivoted to co-op multiplayer, and how it feels to play... Read more.

entry.title: Sand publisher celebrates 300,000 copies sold: 'We getting a half hour of air conditioning tonight!'
entry.content: X A couple weeks after its early access launch, things are going mostly pretty well for the steampunk-mechs-in-the-desert game Sand: Raiders of Sophie . An update that rolled out on July 2 caused some surprise headaches and had to be rolled back, which isn't great, but on the brighter side the game looks to be a legitimate hit, too... Read more.

entry.title: The Jackass Sticker Capsule
entry.content: Today we’re excited to release the Jackass Sticker Capsule in association with Paramount Games Studio, Jackass graphic artist Andy Jenkins, and community artist TheDanidem. Celebrating the release of jackass: best and last , the Jackass Sticker Capsule contains 39 stickers referencing iconic Jackass moments. Whether it’s an airhorn on a golf course or a trip down Electric Avenue, there’s something for every jackass in here; even you!

entry.title: OPEN GAME FEST 2026
entry.content: OPEN GAME FEST is an offline event held in Kyoto, designed to foster growth and boost motivation among game developers and students aiming to enter the industry. The event serves as a platform for both creators and the general public to discover brand-new games. This year, we are excited to introduce our very first online event page. Even if you cannot attend in person, you can still explore the exhibited titles in depth. We hope you enjoy the event!

entry.title: Cyberpunk 2077 has now sold more than 40 million copies, 'a testament to what CD Projekt does best'
entry.content: It's hard to imagine now, but Cyberpunk 2077 was an unmitigated disaster when it launched back in 2020. The PC version wasn't too bad, relatively speaking, but the console version was so wretched that Sony literally kicked it off the PlayStation Store . It was so far gone that several months after launch, with CD Projekt just beginning to start the work of cleaning up the mess it made, we recommended that it just fix the bugs and move on . Whoops ... Read more.

entry.title: EVE Online studio Fenris follows through on yearslong promise to make its in-house game engine fully open source
entry.content: On July 1, Fenris Creations (formerly CCP) completed the full open source release of its in-house Carbon Engine, the tech behind long-running MMO EVE Online and early access space survival game EVE Frontier. The Carbon Engine's repositories are available now on GitHub ... Read more.

entry.title: Community Exhibit Vol. 26

Stack Up supports US and Allied veterans by promoting positive mental health and combat

entry.title: UK Rework Project: Inverness
entry.content: We hope you've packed a warm jacket and perhaps a wee bit of shortbread, because today we're taking you to the Scottish Highlands! We're excited to share with you a closer look at Inverness, a brand-new city arriving as part of our upcoming UK Rework project for Euro Truck Simulator 2 . Let's take a closer look at what this destination has to offer drivers. Known as the "Gateway to the Highlands", Inverness serves as an important hub for transport, tourism, and industry in the north of Scotland.

entry.title: Top scientists uncover way to make Kingdom Come: Deliverance more complicated—turn it into a board game
entry.content: Here's my problem with Kingdom Come: Deliverance —it's simply not finicky enough. It's too straightforward, I am too able to keep its rules and demands in my head, the game does not compel me to keep track of enough small things. Oh, you expect me to put my armour on in a precise order? That's complicated. For babies ... Read more.

entry.title: 26.6 (PT) – 2.7 (CZW) Komunikat dotyczący walki z agresywnymi użytkownikami
entry.content: Cześć, tu ekipa gry The First Descendant. Oto wynik naszej walki z agresywnymi użytkownikami. Akcję przeprowadziliśmy między 26.6 (PT) – 2.7 (CZW). Walczymy z agresywnymi zachowaniami podczas rozgrywki, by wszyscy Potomkowie mogli cieszyć się grą w miłej atmosferze. Jeśli zauważycie odstające od normy, agresywne zachowania, zgłoście je nam poprzez system zgłaszania znajdujący się w grze. Poniżej znajdziecie szczegóły podjętych przez nas działań. ■ Status działań – Okres trwania: 26.6.2026 (PT)

entry.title: Path of Exile 2 at gamescom 2026
entry.content: Path of Exile 2 will once again be heading to gamescom in Cologne, Germany. Play a special demo available exclusively at the event, snap some photos with our eerie display, and pick up exclusive merchandise. We'll be sharing more details closer to the event, and we hope to see you there! If you're a content creator or member of the media looking to cover the event, feel free to reach out to us at media@grindinggear.com .

entry.content: Hi all, just pushed a couple more fixes. FIXED: Octane's jump pads will no longer bounce unintended objects (thank you for making the most of this bug with firing range clips, they made us chuckle). Made adjustments to further improve recent FPS fixes.

entry.title: Carcass Clad is less story-heavy than Mouthwashing, but 'a lot of thought' has gone into it: 'We haven't discovered how much we can push it'
entry.content: fter blowing the doors down with narrative horror game Mouthwashing, developer Wrong Organ decided to zig instead of zag : Its next project is Carcass Clad, a roguelike co-op tank simulator in a city where things have gone deeply wrong. But while developer Jeffrey Tomec told me that scripted narrative is on the "back burner for sure" this time, it sounds like Wrong Organ is trying to find a balance for its love of story and worldbuilding... Read more.

entry.title: 'Fewer than 10' employees remain at Thick as Thieves studio following another round of layoffs
entry.content: Thick as Thieves developer OtherSide Entertainment has laid off 18 employees, according to a Game Developer report, a move that comes just two weeks after the studio laid off 17 people following the cancellation of a new game it had in development. A studio rep told the site that following this round of cuts, "fewer than 10" people remain employed at OtherSide, working on updates for Thick as Thieves, and that there are "currently no plans for the studio to work on any future games.".. Read more

entry.title: A Decal Trophy and Discount on the J35A for 100 Years of the Swedish Air Force!
entry.content: On July 1st 1926, the Swedish Air Force was established as a separate military branch. Today it celebrates its centenary! The country maintained neutrality during both World War II and the Cold War while simultaneously building up its military capabilities. This was particularly true of the Air Force: aviation enthusiasts worldwide are well aware of the Draken, Viggen, Gripen, and other masterpieces of Swedish aircraft engineering. The J35A is temporarily available for Golden Eagles at a 50% dis

entry.title: A Decal Trophy and Discounts for Japan Self-Defense Forces Day!
entry.content: The Japan Self-Defense Forces were established on July 1st 1954. Initially, they held only a defensive mandate, but over time they began participating in international missions (typically UN peacekeeping operations) and providing assistance to their allies. The Self-Defense Forces are also deployed to assist during major natural disasters, such as the earthquakes of 1995 and 2011. The IJN Kiyoshimo and J2M4 Kai are temporarily available for Golden Eagles with a 50% discount! When: From July 1st

Or at least, that's how it felt for a long time—personally, I stopped adding the caveat 'good for a videogame adaptation' after I watched the Fallout show and learned these things didn't have to be somewhere between middling and godawful. But what do Fallout's designers and developers think of the show?.. Read more.

entry.title: Nightdive says compatibility with fan missions was a big priority for Thief Remastered, and there's one massive mod in particular it knew it had to get working
entry.content: Thief: The Dark Project is a brilliant game for many reasons, among which is that it has one of the best mapping communities of any game. While the Doom and Quake mapping scenes are larger and more prolific, Thief's mappers consistently punch so far above their weight they should probably get into boxing sims rather than stealth games. They regularly deliver maps, missions and entire campaigns that are orders of magnitude more ambitious than what exists in the base game... Read more.

entry.title: Riot delays 'last hit indicators' in League of Legends ranked mode after fan response: 'We want to get more data and feedback'
entry.content: Once you've lost a few thousand hours to a MOBA, it's easy to forget how hard it was to learn. A game like League of Legends has well over a hundred playable characters, all sorts of items and jungle monsters, and even the basics can be fussy. One of the most crucial is the zen practice of "last hitting," or swinging at a hostile creep right as it's about to die to get credit and gold for the kill... Read more.

entry.title: Star Wars: Galactic Racer has a lot more Slay the Spire DNA than I expected, because its ex-Burnout devs wanted to add 'real consequence' to each race
entry.content: Don't call Galactic Racer "Podracer" in front of its developers—they'll politely point out that their new game is about multiple types of racing in the Star Wars universe, and it is not a sequel to 1999's Episode 1 Racer, despite featuring podracing's most iconic characters and courses. At first this feels like splitting hairs to mollify the strict branding watchdogs of the Walt Disney Corporation, but play a few minutes of the new racer and the distinction starts to make more sense... Read more

entry.title: Fallout: New Vegas director Josh Sawyer says the NCR and Caesar's Legion feel so real because their members disagree and challenge each other: 'You have to wrestle with the fact that it contains multitudes'
entry.content: Fallout: New Vegas is an incredible game, and its factions are its best part. entry.title: A Decal Trophy for British Armed Forces Day!
entry.content: The first Victoria Cross ceremony took place on June 26th 1857. In 2009, the last Saturday in June was designated British Armed Forces Day. The British Army distinguished itself most prominently during the Second World War, when following the surrender of France, Britain and the Commonwealth remained Germany’s only adversaries for a full year. After the Second World War, Britain primarily fought as part of coalition forces, but the Falklands War vividly demonstrated its military effectiveness. O

entry.title: I've played countless Doom engine games, so believe me when I say this one that combines the FPS with JRPG combat might be the coolest one in 30 years
entry.content: I know my Doom , and its many derivatives . I've been covering it for years . It has almost never left my PC in over three decades, so I do not say this lightly. End of Starchild —a completely free, standalone game from prolific musician and indie dev Em Essex—might be the single coolest thing built on Doom's venerable, time-tested foundations... Read more.

entry.content: Witamy wszystkich, którzy uwielbiają dobre okazje na świetne gry (mamy nadzieję, że wszyscy)! Letnia wyprzedaż Steam oznacza, że cały Sklep Steam jest wypełniony zniżkami, zniżkami i jeszcze raz zniżkami, co potwierdzi nasz oficjalny zwiastun powyżej. Potrwa ona od teraz do 9 lipca do godziny 19:00 czasu polskiego (tak, aż tak długo). Jakiego gatunku gier byście nie kochali i nie wybrali, znajdziecie zniżki wszelkiego rodzaju. Bitwy kulinarne, eksploracja wszechświata, walka na miecze/pistolety/

entry.title: With Destiny 2 over, Bungie lays off 'most of the Destiny team and some Marathon team members'
entry.content: Bungie has announced a "reduction in force" as it reorganizes following the end of development on Destiny 2 , saying that with its premiere game now ended and new projects still in very early stages of development, "we unfortunately could not continue operating at our previous size.".. entry.title: The TVR Cerbera 12 Takes Over Japan to Celebrate the ‘90s!
entry.content: The 1998 TVR Cerbera 12 is a car some consider too crazy to go on the roads, but it’ll always be welcome in Horizon Japan for any and all adventures. To accomplish its objective of becoming the fastest and most powerful road car ever, the Speed 12 is powered by a 7.7-liter V12 made by fusing two of TVR's straight-6 engines. entry.title: Y11S2.1 PATCH NOTES
entry.content: BALANCING DOKKAEBI Introducing a cooldown will limit the ability to chain activations in quick succession, reducing constant pressure on Defenders. This change creates more defined engagement windows, giving Defenders additional opportunities to reposition between uses. It also reinforces the importance of timing and coordination for Dokkaebi players. JEGEO PAYLOAD Cooldown: 7 seconds.
